hausa.metallic_fm_bell_tone: Sautin FM bell mai kama da ƙarfe
hausa.karplus_strong_plucked_string: Igiyar da aka ja ta Karplus-Strong
hausa.barry_harris_1929_2021_codified_bebop_: Barry Harris (1929-2021) ya tsara harmony na bebop. Tsarinsa yana amfani da chords na 6 maimakon na 7 kuma yana ƙara diminished passing chords tsakanin matakan scale don santsin voice leading.
hausa.attack_time_to_reach_full_volume_decay: Attack: lokacin isa cikakken volume. Decay: lokacin faɗuwa zuwa sustain. Sustain: matakin volume da ake riƙe. Release: lokacin ɓacewa bayan an saki key.
hausa.a_scale_is_an_ordered_set_of_pitches_m: Scale tsari ne na pitches da aka jera. Modes juyawa ne na scale da ke farawa a matakai daban-daban. Kowanne yana haifar da yanayin ji daban.
hausa.chords_are_built_by_stacking_intervals: Ana gina chords ta hanyar tara intervals (na 3). Major yana amfani da major 3rd + minor 3rd. Minor yana juya su. Fadaɗaɗɗun chords suna ƙara na 7, na 9, da bayansu.
hausa.kicks_use_a_sine_oscillator_with_a_pit: Kicks suna amfani da sine oscillator mai pitch sweep. Snares suna haɗa hayaniya (an tace) + jikin toni. Hi-hats suna amfani da fashewar hayaniya da aka tace ta high-pass.
hausa.4_4_4_quarter_note_beats_per_bar_most_: 4/4 = beats 4 na quarter-note kowace bar (mafi yawa). 3/4 = jin waltz. 6/8 = compound duple. 5/4 da 7/8 suna haifar da grooves marasa daidaituwa, na baƙo.
hausa.keys_arranged_by_ascending_5ths_clockw: An tsara keys ta hawan 5ths a hanyar agogo. Keys makwabta suna raba notes 6 cikin 7. Tafiya a hanyar agogo yana ƙara sharps; akasin haka yana ƙara flats.
hausa.every_musical_sound_contains_overtones: Kowane sautin kiɗa yana ɗauke da overtones sama da tushen. Ƙarfinsu na dangi yana ƙayyade timbre — shi ya sa trumpet ke jin daban da flute a pitch ɗaya.
hausa.an_interval_is_the_distance_between_tw: Interval shi ne nisa tsakanin pitches biyu, ana auna shi da semitones. Rabon frequency yana ƙayyade consonance (rabo mai sauƙi kamar 3:2 yana jin santsi).
hausa.plays_chord_notes_one_at_a_time_in_seq: Yana kunna notes na chord ɗaya-ɗaya cikin jeri. Sama = ƙasa zuwa sama, Ƙasa = sama zuwa ƙasa. Yana haifar da patterns masu gudana daga chords tsayayye.
hausa.a_filter_removes_frequencies_above_low: Filter yana cire frequencies da ke sama (lowpass), ƙasa (highpass), ko kewaye (bandpass) da cutoff frequency. Resonance (Q) yana ƙarfafa frequencies kusa da cutoff, yana haifar da kololuwa.
hausa.tremolo_periodic_volume_changes_amplit: Tremolo: canjin volume na lokaci-lokaci (amplitude modulation). Vibrato: canjin pitch na lokaci-lokaci (frequency modulation). Duka ana sarrafa su da LFO (Low Frequency Oscillator).
hausa.discovered_in_1983_a_noise_burst_feeds: An gano shi a 1983. Fashewar hayaniya tana shiga cikin gajeriyar delay line mai feedback. Lokacin delay yana ƙayyade pitch. Filter a cikin feedback loop yana sarrafa haske da ɓacewa. Yana kwaikwayon igiyoyin da aka ja ta halitta.
hausa.the_sequencer_is_a_composition_tool_ea: Sequencer kayan aikin tsara kiɗa ne. Kowane mataki yana wakiltar rabon beat. Layin melody yana saita notes masu pitch, drums suna ƙara rhythm. Notation na kiɗa yana nuna abin da ka ƙirƙira.
hausa.notes_on_lines_and_spaces_represent_pi: Notes a kan layuka da wurare suna wakiltar pitches. Ana nuna tsawon lokaci ta siffar note: cikakke (○), rabi (𝅗𝅥), quarter (♩), na takwas (♪). Staff yana amfani da layuka 5.
hausa.equal_temperament_12_notes_per_octave_: Equal temperament: notes 12 kowace octave, rabo 2^(1/12). A4 = 440 Hz; A5 = 880 Hz. Well-Tempered Clavier na Bach (1722) ya shawo kan duniya kan wannan sasantawa. Kowace note da ka kunna a nan tana zaune a kan wannan grid.
hausa.major_w_w_h_w_w_w_h_minor_w_h_w_w_h_w_: Major: W-W-H-W-W-W-H. Minor: W-H-W-W-H-W-W. Modes 7 (Ionian, Dorian, Phrygian, Lydian, Mixolydian, Aeolian, Locrian) suna fitowa daga juya pattern na intervals na major-scale.
hausa.triads_root_third_fifth_major_4_3_semi: Triads: root + third + fifth. Major (semitones 4+3), minor (3+4), diminished (3+3), augmented (4+4). Chord na 7 yana ƙara wani third. Kiɗan pop = chords ~6 masu maimaituwa; jazz yana amfani da extensions da substitutions.
hausa.sustained_chord_textures_the_bed_under: Textures na chord masu dorewa — tushen da ke ƙarƙashin kusan kowane kiɗan fim. Gwada iv-V-i a minor, ko i-VI-VII don jin na Hans Zimmer. Drones a fifths suna tallafawa al'adun gargajiya na Indiya da bagpipe.
hausa.beat_pad_sample_based_drums: Beat Pad — drums masu tushen sample
hausa.most_popular_music_sits_at_4_4_90_130_: Yawancin shahararren kiɗa yana zaune a 4/4, 90-130 BPM. Hip-hop ~85-95, house 120-130, drum-and-bass ~170 (jin half-time). Kick a 1+3, snare a 2+4 = backbeat — tushen rock + pop.
hausa.theory_the_math_behind_the_sound: Theory — lissafin da ke bayan sauti
hausa.pythagoras_500_bce_discovered_consonan: Pythagoras (~500 KZ) ya gano consonance daga integer frequency ratios: octave 2:1, fifth 3:2, fourth 4:3. Helmholtz ya faɗaɗa shi a 1862. Sauti = raƙuman matsawa; kiɗa = patterns da muka yarda mu kira kyakkyawa.
hausa.full_chord_grid_strum_plate_and_voice_: Cikakken chord grid, strum plate, da voice presets
hausa.drag_across_strings_to_strum: Ja a kan strings don ka strum!
hausa.frequency_modulation_fm_synthesis_uses: Frequency Modulation (FM) synthesis yana amfani da oscillator ɗaya (modulator) don canza frequency na wani (carrier) da sauri. Rabon modulator:carrier yana ƙayyade harmonic content. Rabo mai sauƙi (1:1, 2:1, 3:1) yana samar da harmonic tones. Rabo mai rikitarwa yana samar da sauti na ƙarfe, kamar ƙararrawa, ko marasa harmonic. Yamaha DX7 ya shahara da FM a 1983.
hausa.supersaw_stacks_multiple_sawtooth_osci: SuperSaw yana tara sawtooth oscillators da yawa da aka ɗan detune daga juna. Wannan yana haifar da babban sauti mai faɗi, mai walƙiya — alamar EDM, trance, da pop na zamani. Voices masu yawa = sauti mai kauri amma yana amfani da CPU sosai. Detuning yana sarrafa nisan tuning na voices — detune mai yawa = mai faɗi/kamar chorus, kaɗan = matse/mai da hankali.
hausa.an_arpeggiator_plays_the_notes_of_a_ch: 🔬 Arpeggiator yana kunna notes na chord ɗaya-ɗaya cikin jeri. "Up" yana tashi ƙasa zuwa sama, yana haifar da makamashi mai hawa. "Down" yana saukowa don jin kamar magudanar ruwa. Gudu yana sarrafa saurin (kaɗan = sauri). Gate yana sarrafa tsawon lokacin da kowace note ke ƙara (100% = legato, 10% = staccato). Gwada gudu=100ms + octaves 4 + up pattern don classic trance arp!
hausa.sing_speak_or_play_an_instrument_hear_: Rera, yi magana, ko kunna kaɗa-kaɗa — ji effects a lokaci-lokaci!
hausa.monitor_hear_yourself_use_headphones: 🔊 Monitor (ka ji kanka — yi amfani da headphones!)
hausa.how_effects_change_sound_waves: 🔬 Yadda Effects ke Canza Raƙuman Sauti
hausa.removes_frequencies_above_lowpass_or_b: Yana cire frequencies da ke sama (lowpass) ko ƙasa (highpass) da wani iyaka. Kamar rufe baki da hannu — yana cire high frequencies, yana sa sauti ya zama "duhu."
hausa.creates_echoes_by_copying_the_signal_a: Yana haifar da amsa-kuwa ta kwafin signal da sake kunna shi bayan ɗan lokaci. Feedback yana sarrafa yawan amsa-kuwan da ke maimaituwa.
hausa.simulates_room_acoustics_by_creating_t: Yana kwaikwayon acoustics na ɗaki ta hanyar haifar da dubban ƙananan amsa-kuwa da ke haɗuwa. Ƙaramin ɗaki = gajeren reverb, babban coci = dogon reverb.
hausa.clips_the_waveform_peaks_turning_smoot: Yana yanke kololuwar waveform, yana juya santsin sine waves zuwa siffofi masu tsauri, masu kusurwa. Wannan yana ƙara sabbin harmonics da ba su kasance a asalin sauti ba.
hausa.duplicates_the_signal_with_a_slight_co: Yana kwafin signal da ɗan delay da ke canzawa koyaushe. Wannan yana kwaikwayon voices/kaɗa-kaɗa da yawa suna kunna tare da ɗan bambancin lokaci.
hausa.rapidly_varies_the_volume_up_and_down_: Yana canza volume sama da ƙasa da sauri, yana haifar da tasiri mai bugawa. Ya zama ruwan dare a surf guitar da kiɗan organ.
hausa.use_headphones_when_monitoring_to_avoi: Yi amfani da headphones lokacin monitoring don gujewa feedback loops! Mic yana bi ta cikin dukan effects da ke sama (filter, delay, reverb, da sauransu) — daidaita su don jin yadda kowanne ke canza muryarka ko kaɗa-kaɗa.
hausa.connect_your_microphone_to_run_your_vo: Haɗa microphone ɗinka don gudanar da muryarka ko kaɗa-kaɗa ta cikin sarƙar effects a lokaci-lokaci.
hausa.see_your_voice_as_a_waveform_frequency: Ga muryarka a matsayin waveform + frequency spectrum. Ji yadda filter, delay, reverb, distortion, da chorus ke canza raƙuman sauti a zahiri.
hausa.touch_drag_x_pitch_y_filter_effect: Taɓa & ja — X = pitch, Y = filter/effect
hausa.the_xy_pad_maps_your_finger_mouse_posi: XY pad yana danganta wurin yatsa/mouse ɗinka da parameters na kiɗa a lokaci-lokaci. Axis na X yana sarrafa pitch (hagu = ƙasa, dama = sama). Axis na Y yana sarrafa filter cutoff frequency (sama = haske, ƙasa = duhu). Wannan yayi kama da kaɗa-kaɗa kamar Korg Kaoss Pad, wanda ya kawo sauyi a wasan kiɗan lantarki na kai tsaye ta juya gestures na 2D zuwa sauti.
hausa.xy_performance_pad_left_right_is_pitch: XY performance pad. Hagu-dama shine pitch, sama-ƙasa shine haske na filter. Yi amfani da arrow keys don motsawa da kunna note; danna Escape ko Space don tsayawa.
hausa.sequencer_drum_pads_notation_samples_m: Sequencer, drum pads, notation, samples & ƙari →
hausa.click_cells_to_place_notes_visual_melo: Danna cells don sanya notes — visual melody editor
hausa.common_progressions_click_to_hear: Progressions na kowa — danna don ji
hausa.chord_progressions_create_emotional_jo: Chord progressions suna haifar da tafiye-tafiyen ji. Chord na I (tonic) yana ji kamar 'gida.' Chord na V (dominant) yana haifar da tashin hankali da ke son warwarewa zuwa I. Chord na vi (relative minor) yana ƙara baƙin ciki ko zurfi. Chord na IV (subdominant) yana nisantar gida a hankali. An kiyasta progression na I-V-vi-IV yana bayyana a sama da 70% na waƙoƙin pop domin yana daidaita waɗannan ji sosai.
hausa.roman_numerals_i_ii_iii_iv_v_vi_vii_re: Lambobin Roman (I, ii, iii, IV, V, vi, vii°) suna wakiltar matakan scale. Babban baƙi = chord na major. Ƙaramin baƙi = chord na minor.
hausa.click_notes_to_hear_them: Danna notes don ka ji su!
hausa.add_melody_notes_in_the_grid_above: Ƙara melody notes a grid ɗin da ke sama ↑
hausa.click_melody_cells_in_the_grid_above_t: Danna melody cells a grid ɗin da ke sama don ganin notation a nan
hausa.load_this_rhythm_into_row_0_kick: A loda wannan rhythm a row 0 (Kick)?
hausa.click_challenge_me_to_practice_rhythm_: Danna "Ka ƙalubalance ni!" don yin atisayen rhythm patterns
hausa.upload_wav_mp3_files_for_custom_pads_s: Loda fayilolin WAV/MP3 don custom pads. Samples suna share sa'ad da aka sabunta shafi.
hausa.add_current_pattern_as_a_section: Ƙara pattern na yanzu a matsayin section
hausa.add_current_as_section: + Ƙara na Yanzu a matsayin Section
hausa.create_a_drum_pattern_in_the_grid_abov: Ƙirƙiri drum pattern a grid ɗin da ke sama, sannan danna "+ Ƙara na Yanzu a matsayin Section" don fara gina waƙa.
hausa.sections_intro_verse_chorus_bridge_cho: Sections: Intro → Verse → Chorus → Bridge → Chorus → Outro
hausa.no_saved_beats_yet_create_a_pattern_an: Babu beats da aka ajiye tukuna. Ƙirƙiri pattern kuma danna Ajiye!
hausa.harmonypad_creates_warm_pure_tones_by_: HarmonyPad yana haifar da tones masu ɗumi, tsantsa ta haɗa sine da triangle waves. Zaɓi voice, zaɓi chord daga grid ɗin da ke ƙasa, sannan ka strum plate!
hausa.chord_grid_tap_to_select_space_to_stru: 🎶 Chord Grid — taɓa don zaɓi, Space don strum
hausa.strum_plate_tap_or_drag_across: 🎸 Strum Plate — taɓa ko ja a kai
hausa.hear_see_the_waveform_and_learn_the_st: Ji, ga waveform, kuma koyi tarihin kowane kaɗa-kaɗa
hausa.this_is_how_different_instruments_get_: Haka ne kaɗa-kaɗa daban-daban ke samun sautinsu na musamman! Flute galibi harmonic 1 ne (sine). Clarinet yana da odd harmonics (1,3,5,7). Violin yana da dukan harmonics. Danna don gina timbre naka!
hausa.karplus_strong_synthesis_creates_reali: Karplus-Strong synthesis yana haifar da ainihin sautin igiyar da aka ja ta amfani da gajeriyar fashewar hayaniya da aka aika zuwa delay line mai filtered feedback. Daidaita haske (launin hayaniya na farko) da damping (tsawon sustain) don tsara halayen igiya.
hausa.identify_each_note_in_the_4_note_melod: Gano kowace note a cikin melody na notes 4:
hausa.strong_high_harmonics_pierces_sparkles: Manyan harmonics masu ƙarfi — suna soka / walƙiya.
hausa.fundamental_heavy_gentle_highs_acousti: Mai nauyi a tushe, high masu laushi. Kamar acoustic.
hausa.mid_heavy_without_fundamental_woody_cu: Mai nauyi a tsakiya ba tare da tushe ba — kamar itace/cuckoo flute.
hausa.almost_pure_fundamental_muffled_sub_li: Kusan tushe tsantsa — mai rufa / kamar sub.
hausa.roughly_equal_harmonics_full_natural_t: Harmonics masu kusan daidaituwa — cikakke / timbre na halitta.
hausa.adjust_fundamental_mid_and_high_harmon: Daidaita matakan harmonic na fundamental, mid, da high. Widget yana rarraba ɗaya daga cikin timbres biyar daban-daban. Babu maki, babu bayyanawa — motsa ka lura.
hausa.hypothesis_free_text_which_harmonic_le: Hasashe (rubutu na kyauta): Wane matakin harmonic ne ke ƙayyade "haske" da "ɗumi"?
hausa.hold_two_sliders_steady_move_one_watch: Riƙe sliders biyu daram. Motsa ɗaya. Lura.
hausa.find_two_settings_producing_the_same_t: Nemo saituna biyu da ke samar da timbre ɗaya. Wane rabo suke rabawa?
hausa.real_instruments_have_characteristic_s: Ainihin kaɗa-kaɗa suna da spectra na musamman. Bincika dalilin da yasa flute ke jin daban da violin.
hausa.explain_how_harmonic_content_determine: Bayyana yadda harmonic content ke ƙayyade fahimtar timbre.
hausa.design_note_discrete_5_class_timbre_ma: Bayanin ƙira: discrete 5-class timbre marker; babu maki na aminci na sauti; babu bayyanawa — da gangan.
hausa.using_simple_everyday_words_and_short_: ta amfani da kalmomi masu sauƙi na yau da kullun da gajerun jimloli, ba tare da jargon ba
hausa.for_a_5th_grade_student_brief_and_frie: ga ɗalibin aji 5, taƙaice da abokantaka
hausa.for_a_student_who_already_knows_some_m: ga ɗalibin da ya riga ya san wasu music theory
hausa.click_explain_for_the_ai_tutor_to_desc: Danna "Bayyana" don AI tutor ya bayyana abin da wannan view ke koyarwa a matakin karatun da ka zaɓa.
hausa.harmonic_series_why_instruments_sound_: 🎵 Harmonic Series — Dalilin da yasa kaɗa-kaɗa ke jin daban
